en_title: Take-Two Boss Says 2K's WWE Franchise Could Be 'Double or Triple the Size' It Is Now
cn_title: Take-Two老板：WWE系列规模还能翻两倍
subtitle: 潜力巨大
opus_summary: Take-Two CEO Strauss Zelnick 表示，2K旗下的《WWE》系列游戏潜力巨大，规模可达到现在的两到三倍。他指出游戏质量仍有提升空间，并强调团队不会自满。此前《WWE 2K26》获IGN 7分评价，而《WWE 2K27》已确认将于2027年3月发售。Zelnick 认为，只要持续取悦玩家并提供符合品牌调性的创新内容，该系列就能实现大幅增长。然而，近期《WWE 2K》系列因引入战斗通行证系统取代传统DLC包而引发玩家不满，2K不得不调整策略，从第二赛季起让高级通行证的角色立即解锁，并降低升级所需经验值。未来《WWE 2K27》将如何改进以扩大受众，值得关注。

paragraphs.en: The boss of Take-Two believes 2K’s WWE video games could be much more successful than they currently are, pointing to “ongoing opportunities to improve the quality of the game.”
paragraphs.cn: Take-Two 的老板认为，2K 旗下的《WWE》系列游戏还有很大的成功潜力，他指出「游戏质量仍有持续提升的空间」。

paragraphs.en: While 2K’s WWE franchise is successful, it’s overshadowed by 2K’s NBA franchise, which makes mountains of cash for parent company Take-Two. Both games are developed by the California-based studio Visual Concepts. The most recent release was WWE 2K26, which IGN awarded a 7/10 . “WWE 2K26 benefits most from having been built on a tremendous foundation – one that has barely had to change, but continues to in ways that are starting to hurt more than help,” we said. WWE 2K27 is already confirmed, likely for a March 2027 release date.
paragraphs.cn: 尽管 2K 的《WWE》系列已经取得了成功，但相比为母公司 Take-Two 带来巨额收入的《NBA》系列，它仍显得黯然失色。这两款游戏均由位于加州的 Visual Concepts 工作室开发。最新作《WWE 2K26》IGN 给出了 7/10 的评分。我们评价道：「《WWE 2K26》最大的优势在于它建立在一个极佳的基础之上——这个基础几乎不需要改变，但持续的变化开始弊大于利。」《WWE 2K27》已确认存在，预计将于 2027 年 3 月发售。

paragraphs.en: In its latest financial report, Take-Two said WWE 2K26 “recurrent consumer spending” is up 20% year-over-year and more than 85 million matches played, an increase of 7% compared to WWE 2K25. But Take-Two CEO Strauss Zelnick told IGN that he believes the WWE franchise could grow significantly, saying Visual Concepts “always wants to do better.”
paragraphs.cn: 在最新的财报中，Take-Two 表示《WWE 2K26》的「重复消费支出」同比增长 20%，比赛场次超过 8500 万，比《WWE 2K25》增长了 7%。但 Take-Two CEO Strauss Zelnick 告诉 IGN，他认为《WWE》系列还有很大的增长空间，并表示 Visual Concepts「总是想做得更好」。

paragraphs.en: “We're very proud of Metacritic score, we're proud of how the title performed,” Zelnick said. “We have great partners at TKO led by Nick Khan. And of course everything related to WWE continues to grow. The team over there is just crushing it. So we're thrilled to be in business with TKO and WWE.
paragraphs.cn: 「我们对 Metacritic 评分感到非常自豪，也对游戏的表现感到自豪，」Zelnick 说道。「我们在 TKO 有 Nick Khan 领导的优秀合作伙伴。当然，所有与 WWE 相关的事物都在持续增长。那边的团队表现非常出色。因此，我们很高兴能与 TKO 和 WWE 合作。」

paragraphs.en: “I do think there's ongoing opportunities to improve the quality of the game. I do think that we can give consumers more of what they want. And I know our team at Visual Concepts always wants to do better. We're never in the business of patting ourselves on the back. We believe that arrogance is the enemy of continued success. And I think that title could be double or triple the size that it is as long as we delight consumers, and as long as we give them something new and not expected that's consistent with the brand that they love. That's our job.”
paragraphs.cn: 「我确实认为游戏质量还有持续提升的机会。我确实认为我们可以给消费者更多他们想要的东西。而且我知道 Visual Concepts 的团队总是想做得更好。我们从不自满。我们相信傲慢是持续成功的敌人。我认为，只要我们取悦消费者，给他们带来符合他们喜爱品牌调性的、新颖且出乎意料的东西，这个系列就能达到现在两到三倍的规模。这就是我们的工作。」

paragraphs.en: The question will be, how can Visual Concepts change the game to get WWE to the level Zelnick clearly believes it could be hitting? Monetization has been a thorny subject for players recently, and 2K recently had to following widespread criticism from the community.
paragraphs.cn: 问题在于，Visual Concepts 要如何改变游戏，才能让《WWE》达到 Zelnick 显然认为可以达到的水平？最近，变现方式一直是玩家们棘手的议题，2K 在遭到社区广泛批评后不得不做出调整。

paragraphs.en: Ever since the new battle pass system was revealed for this year’s 2K wrestling release, players had expressed concerns over how it would replace the traditional six DLC packs that they’d come to expect — the crux of the issue being that it would now take dozens of hours of play to unlock members of the roster by completing all 40 tiers of the pass, rather than the instant unlocks that DLC packs used to grant.
paragraphs.cn: 自从今年的 2K 摔角游戏公布了新的战斗通行证系统后，玩家们就表达了担忧，因为它将取代玩家们习惯的传统六个 DLC 包——问题的关键在于，现在需要花费数十小时的游戏时间，完成通行证的全部 40 个等级才能解锁角色，而不是像以前 DLC 包那样即时解锁。

paragraphs.en: This meant that even when paying for the premium tiers of the Ringside Pass, fans would have to sink more hours into their busy schedules than anticipated, just to receive the wrestling icons they’d already purchased.
paragraphs.cn: 这意味着，即使购买了 Ringside Pass 的高级等级，粉丝们也不得不在繁忙的日程中投入比预期更多的时间，才能获得他们已经付费购买的摔角明星。

paragraphs.en: But from Season 2 onward, all four characters in the Premium track of the pass are unlocked immediately in Tier 1. Meanwhile, the amount of XP needed to progress through each tier was reduced from 800 to 625, a number 2K says wouldn’t be increased again. Each Ringside Pass costs $9.99/£8.99 per season, with an annual pass available for $49.99/£44.99.
paragraphs.cn: 但从第二赛季开始，通行证高级路线中的所有四个角色都在第一级立即解锁。同时，每级所需的经验值从 800 降低到 625，2K 表示这个数字不会再增加。每个 Ringside Pass 每赛季售价 9.99美元(约合人民币71元)/8.99英镑(约合人民币83元)，年票售价 49.99美元(约合人民币357元)/44.99英镑(约合人民币416元)。

paragraphs.en: All eyes will be on WWE 2K27, then, to see what improvements Visual Concepts comes up with that might expanding the audience for the game.
paragraphs.cn: 因此，所有人的目光都将聚焦在《WWE 2K27》上，看看 Visual Concepts 会带来哪些改进，从而扩大游戏的受众群体。

paragraphs.en: Wesley is Director, News at IGN. Find him on Twitter at @wyp100. You can reach Wesley at wesley_yinpoole@ign.com or confidentially at wyp100@proton.me.
paragraphs.cn: Wesley 是 IGN 新闻总监。你可以在 Twitter 上通过 @wyp100 找到他。也可以通过 wesley_yinpoole@ign.com 联系 Wesley，或通过 wyp100@proton.me 进行保密联系。
